_comment: Beyond-Duckling extension: holidays introduced or federally recognized after Duckling's holiday data froze (~2020-03). The Duckling oracle returns nothing for these, so expected values are hand-authored against official government dates rather than oracle-verified. Reference date 2013-02-12 (same as the corpus ctx()); dates are the recurring calendar date for that year.

cases.note: US federal holiday since June 2021; formal name for the June 19 date Duckling already had under 'juneteenth'
2nd Monday of October; plural/apostrophe spelling Duckling's 'indigenous people's day' regex missed

cases.input: national day for truth and reconciliation
cases.note: Canadian federal statutory holiday since 2021, September 30

expected.holidayBeta: National Day for Truth and Reconciliation
National Day for Truth and Reconciliation

cases.note: observed on the same date as Truth and Reconciliation, September 30

expected.holidayBeta: National Day for Truth and Reconciliation

cases.note: federally designated in Canada since 2021, August 1 (distinct from the US April date)
